request_payload.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our current volunteer force struggles with readiness. The truth is, a modern conscription system—with proper safeguards—could actually strengthen national security while reducing the burden on our overstretched all-volunteer force. Countries like Switzerland prove it works. #NationalService #SecurityFirst
